allow:
Bash(node -e "
const leagues = [
    'swe.hockey', 'sui.hockey', 'swe.elite', 'sui.nl', 'sui.nla',
    'hockey.shl', 'hockey.nla', 'swe.1', 'sui.1'
];
Promise.all\(leagues.map\(id =>
    fetch\('https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/hockey/'+id+'/scoreboard?limit=5'\)
        .then\(r => r.ok ? r.json\(\).then\(d => id+': OK, pelejä='+\( d.events?.length??0\)\) : id+': '+r.status\)
        .catch\(\(\) => id+': virhe'\)
\)\).then\(r => r.forEach\(x => console.log\(x\)\)\);
" 2>&1)

Bash(node -e "
// Kokeillaan tunnettuja hockey-APIja
const urls = [
    'https://api.shl.se/seasons/2024/games',
    'https://openapi.shl.se/seasons',
    'https://www.sihf.ch/de/game-center/api',
    'https://api.national-league.ch/api/results',
    'https://nla.sportsnet.ch/api/games',
];
Promise.all\(urls.map\(url =>
    fetch\(url, {headers:{'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0','Accept':'application/json'}}\)
        .then\(r => url + ': ' + r.status\)
        .catch\(e => url + ': ' + e.message\)
\)\).then\(r => r.forEach\(x=>console.log\(x\)\)\);
" 2>&1)
